_meta.title: TrialCat "Race to Approval" — BOARD_SPEC (merged synthesis)
_meta.author: Flame / Real Cat AI Labs — Board Synthesis lead
synthesizes: Angle A Faithful Evolution (purple gate header + REG seal + waypoint-derived-from-tile-geometry)
Angle B Bold Sticker-Snake (color-by-type legibility + single-source-of-truth pitch constants)
Angle C Living Diorama (cyan road threaded behind tiles + physical standee tokens with hard cast shadow)
_meta.soul_note: The 2018 painting IS a value snake: $100k bottom-right -> $9B top-left, painted specials (grant funding, corp venture, Fire the CRO?, Boot-strap it!, Get acquired?, You are out of money!, Draw +1 staff & REG). We rebuild it as a code-generated SVG so square centers are computable, but keep the soul: cyan field, 32px white grid, REG stamp, cream die-cut tiles, hard ink, solid offset shadows.

sibling_files.sample_svg: board-sample.svg (the literal visual target — open in a browser)

chosen_direction: MERGE: a code-generated SVG boustrophedon snake (Angle B's legibility-first color-by-type tiles) threaded by Angle C's raised cyan road, gated by Angle A's purple-authority milestone tiles + REG seal. We DROP Angle A's lock to the cramped 810x321 viewBox (too tight for 24 tiles + two avatar discs + a spinner on mobile) and Angle C's heavy 3-layer parallax diorama (real illustration cost; ship later as a phase-2 backdrop). The board is ONE buildBoardSVG(pathway, state) -> innerHTML call on a roomy 960x560 viewBox. Both tile x/y AND the avatar waypoint polyline derive from the SAME pitch constants (single source of truth) so avatars can never drift off-square. 24 nodes (not 40): 4 rows x 6 cols reads cleanly, maps 5 milestone gates + START + EXIT + funding/hazard/fork/deck specials onto exact indices, and is honest about the painting's ~36 squares without over-sampling into meaningless tween tiles. Capital is OFF the tiles (lives in the HUD per locked spec #2); tiles show product-value bands as place-names, not prices. Color is assigned by MEANING exactly like game.css: cyan=value, green=funding/go, red=hazard, gold=milestone, purple=fork/authority, cream=deck.

layout_algorithm.summary: Boustrophedon (serpentine) over ROWS=4, COLS=6, climbing from bottom-right (node 0, $100k) to top (node 23, $9B EXIT). Bottom row travels RIGHT->LEFT; rows then alternate. Every node center (cx,cy) is computed from constants; the ordered array of centers IS the avatar waypoint polyline. NO hand-pixel-pushing.

constants._comment: cx range: 96..(96+5*128)=96..736 on a forward row; +148 trailing room to 884 on the bottom start row offset. We anchor cols so node0 (col5,row3) lands at x=884 = MARGIN_X + 5*COL_PITCH + 148? NO — keep it clean: node0 is the FIRST node and sits at the far-right of the bottom row. See formula: we let bottom row use an EXTRA right slot for START so $100k reads as the corner. Simpler canonical formula below uses uniform pitch; START just happens to be the rightmost col of row3.

node_centers._note: START $100k — bottom-RIGHT. Special: col5 of bottom row uses the trailing right slot (MX+5*CP=736) PLUS a +148 start offset so the garage reads as the true corner. In the generic formula node0 sits at cx=736; the sample nudges it to 884 for the START flourish. Engine MUST pick one: recommend uniform cx=736 for node0 and DROP the flourish, OR widen viewBox to 1012 to fit cx=884. The sample uses 884 with viewBox 960 because START bleeds slightly into the right margin band, which is fine (it's the corner).
U-turn GATE on the bottom-left bend, sits between row3 and row2
U-turn GATE on the right bend, between row2 and row1
U-turn DECK (Boot-strap) on the top-left bend
FINAL GATE NDA/BLA — face Dr. Vance

layout_algorithm.implementation_note: The node_centers array above is the EXACT polyline used by the sample SVG, with U-turn/gate nodes (6,13,20) deliberately placed ON the bends rather than strictly on the COLS grid — that's what makes the snake visibly turn. The engine should hardcode this 24-entry NODES table as data (each entry: {cx,cy,type,trigger,label}) rather than deriving purely from the formula, because the 3 bend-gates break the uniform grid on purpose. The nodeCenter() formula is the DERIVATION for the 21 on-grid tiles; the 3 bend nodes are explicit overrides. Single source of truth = this JSON's node_centers, imported into game.js.
layout_algorithm.track_path_d: M 884 478 H 156 Q 96 478 96 418 V 358 Q 96 298 156 298 H 804 Q 864 298 864 238 V 178 Q 864 118 804 118 H 156 Q 96 118 96 78 — the raised cyan road, drawn behind tiles in 3 strokes (22px ink, 14px cyan #3fc6e2, 3px white dashed centerline). It threads the node centers and rounds every U-turn so the climb visibly bends.

tile_render.shared_law: Every tile = (1) SOLID offset shadow rect FIRST at translate(6,7), fill #1b1b1b, never blurred; (2) face rect, stroke #1b1b1b width 4, rx 6; (3) halftone wash rect fill url(#halftone); (4) type content. Fonts: Bricolage Grotesque 800 for labels, value numbers; Inter for any body. The square index sits tiny top-left. Color is by MEANING (game.css palette). Tiles authored as a reusable JS template tileSVG(node) that switches on node.type.
tile_render.defs_needed: <pattern id="grid" w=32 h=32>#2bb8d8 + white grid lines opacity .45 width 2</pattern>; <pattern id="halftone" w=7 h=7>#1b1b1b dot r1.15 opacity .09</pattern>; <g id="regstamp">yellow #e8e52a rounded rect 30x26 ink stroke 3, text 'REG' purple #4a0873</g>.

types.start: GREEN face #5bb545. Label 'START' (size13), big '$100k' (size26 ink), sub 'the garage'. The GO corner. 104x84.
types.value: CREAM face #FAFAF5 with a cyan #2bb8d8 cap band (top 22px) carrying 'VALUE' in cream; big value-band number in purple #4a0873 (e.g. $25M, $300M, $2.5B). 104x84. This is the workhorse ~46% of tiles. Number comes from VALUE_BANDS in game.js — it's a PLACE name, not the capital mechanic.
types.funding: GREEN-SOFT face #c7e3b1. Corner drop-chip '+$' on a #5bb545 badge rotated -8deg. Label 'GRANT' or 'FUNDING' (#2f8a1c), body 'You got funding!' / 'Corp venture funds!'. Trigger: +capital. 104x84.
types.hazard: RED face #ffb3a0. Corner skull badge on #ff3b3b rotated +7deg. Label 'HAZARD' (#b3261a), body 'You are out of money!' Landing here = bankrupt check / capital drain. 104x84.
types.fork: PURPLE-TINT face #d9c2ef. Corner split-arrow badge (ink, no fill). Label 'FORK' (#4a0873), body the choice ('Hire the CRO?', 'Fire the CEO?', 'Get acquired?'). Fires a RAW_DECK 'choose' card (decision modal). 104x84.
types.deck: CREAM face with a mini stacked-card glyph (two rotated rects, yellow+cyan). Label 'DRAW +1 STAFF & a REG card' or a Boot-strap event. Pulls from a deck / fires an event. 104x84 (top-bend deck node uses 104x80).
types.milestone: GOLD face #e8e52a, TALLER 108x108. Purple #4a0873 authority ribbon across the top ('⛓ GATE'), stage name (Pre-IND/Phase 1/Phase 2/Phase 3 — swaps to Concept/Pre-Sub/Bench/Pivotal by pathway), a readiness LOCK bar (white track + green fill showing data vs need), 'NEED N DATA' line, and the REG seal pressed bottom-right. You must have readiness >= stage.need to pass.
types.exit: GOLD face #e8e52a, BIG 116x92. Trophy glyph, 'EXIT', huge '$9B' in red #b3261a. The apex / glass tower. Reaching it (after the final gate clears via Dr. Vance) = WIN.
types.final_gate: GOLD face 116x92 with a RED #b3261a authority ribbon ('★ FINAL GATE'), 'NDA/BLA' (or 'Submission'), 'FACE DR. VANCE', REG seal. This is node 22 — clearing it opens the existing openReview() Dr. Vance flow.

tile_render.exact_value_tile_svg: <g transform="translate(CX,CY)"><rect x="-52" y="-42" width="104" height="84" rx="6" fill="#1b1b1b" transform="translate(6,7)"/><rect x="-52" y="-42" width="104" height="84" rx="6" fill="#FAFAF5" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="4"/><rect x="-52" y="-42" width="104" height="84" rx="6" fill="url(#halftone)"/><rect x="-52" y="-42" width="104" height="22" rx="6" fill="#2bb8d8" opacity="0.85"/><path d="M-52 -20 H52" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="2"/><text x="0" y="-25" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="11" fill="#FAFAF5">VALUE</text><text x="0" y="10" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="22" fill="#4a0873">$25M</text></g>
tile_render.exact_gate_tile_svg: <g transform="translate(CX,CY)"><rect x="-54" y="-54" width="108" height="108" rx="6" fill="#1b1b1b" transform="translate(6,7)"/><rect x="-54" y="-54" width="108" height="108" rx="6" fill="#e8e52a" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="4"/><rect x="-54" y="-54" width="108" height="108" rx="6" fill="url(#halftone)"/><path d="M-54 -48 a6 6 0 0 1 6 -6 H48 a6 6 0 0 1 6 6 V-28 H-54 Z" fill="#4a0873"/><path d="M-54 -28 H54" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="3"/><text x="0" y="-37" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="12" fill="#FAFAF5">⛓ GATE</text><text x="0" y="-6" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="16" fill="#4a0873">Phase 2</text><g transform="translate(0,14)"><rect x="-34" y="-8" width="68" height="16" rx="3" fill="#fff" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="3"/><rect x="-34" y="-8" width="48" height="16" rx="3" fill="#5bb545" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="3"/></g><text x="0" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="11" fill="#4a0873">NEED 22 DATA</text><use href="#regstamp" x="34" y="40"/></g>
tile_render.anti_mirror_rule: Tiles are placed by transform=translate(cx,cy) only — NEVER scaleX(-1) — so on right-to-left rows the value text stays upright ($25M never renders as M52$). The serpentine flip lives in the COLUMN index math, not in a tile transform.
tile_render.non_negotiables: rx never > 6 on a tile face. Shadow is a solid offset rect, never a CSS/SVG blur or feGaussianBlur. No soft gradients (the only gradients allowed are the optional cyan road surface). No shadcn rounded-green-card look. Halftone + ink outline + offset shadow on everything.

milestone_slots._explanation: 5 milestone gates at fixed snake indices. Indices 6, 13, 20 are the three U-turn BEND nodes; we put gates on 6 and 13 (visually they interrupt the climb at the turns) plus interior gates at 10 and 17, and the FINAL gate at 22 (top row, before EXIT). Node 20 (top-left bend) is a DECK/Boot-strap node, not a gate. EXIT is node 23.
milestone_slots.label_swap_rule: Gate geometry NEVER changes between drug and device. Only the gate's stage NAME and need value swap, pulled live from PATHWAYS[S.pathway].stages[k]. buildBoardSVG(pathway, state) reads S.pathway and stamps the right label set. This honors locked decision #5 with one geometry.

special_square_index_map._comment: The painted 2018 specials pinned to snake indices, near their original positions. funding=green, hazard=red, fork=purple, deck=cream.

18.effect: Get acquired? SELL / No thanks buyout fork

milestone_slots.trigger_binding_note: The 36 RAW_DECK REG cards spatialize: 'choose' cards (EVT-029..035) bind to FORK squares; coin/dice swingy cards can fire on DECK squares; good/bad cards (EVT-001..024) are drawn when landing on plain VALUE squares OR via the four action decks. A SPECIAL_TILES table (above) is authored data Angie eyeballs against board.png before lock — straightforward, explicit, honors canon.

avatar_anim.token_design: Each avatar = a die-cut DISC: solid offset shadow circle (translate 4,5 fill #1b1b1b) UNDER a cream #FAFAF5 circle (stroke #1b1b1b width 3), emoji centered, plus a COLLAR CHIP rounded rect below the glyph. CAT (you): r=24, green chip #5bb545 reading 'YOU', rides ABOVE its tile (anchored ~56px above tile center). DOG (rival): r=22, orange chip #f5841f reading 'RIVAL', rides BELOW its tile, mirrored scaleX(-1) + grayscale(0.2) opacity .92 — carries the existing .board-rival visual language straight from game.css. Because cat is above and dog is below, they never overlap when sharing a square.
avatar_anim.hop_keyframes_css: @keyframes hop { 0%{} 35%{ transform: translate(var(--cx),calc(var(--cy) - 8px)) scale(1.12); } 60%{ transform: translate(var(--cx),var(--cy)) scaleY(0.92); } 100%{} } /* comic squash-stretch: up 8px + scale 1.12 at apex, settle. translateY(-6..-8) at apex, scale 1->1.18->0.92->1 family. Honors prefers-reduced-motion (game.css already drops .token animation) — under reduced motion, climb() does a single straight tween, no bounce.
avatar_anim.dog_difference: Dog is mirrored (scaleX(-1)) so it reads as CHASING, desaturated grayscale(0.2) opacity .92, smaller r=22, orange RIVAL chip, and rides BELOW the tile on a slightly lower z so the cat reads foreground when neck-and-neck. The dog moves on its OWN waypoint sync (its competitor progress), not the player's spin.
avatar_anim.scoop_moment: If the dog reaches the 'first to file' node (the final gate, node 22) before the cat, the dog plants a tiny flag standee at that node, the board gets the existing .shake screen-shake, the dog disc gains a red halftone ring (the .tension repeating-linear-gradient), and the run ends beaten_to_market (existing outcome).
avatar_anim.bankrupt_moment: On capital hitting 0, the cat disc flips to a '💸' puff and drops; existing lose('bankrupt') fires. Offset shadow stays solid throughout — never blurred.

spinner_widget.concept: A comic die-cut cyan WHEEL (Angie prefers a spinner over dice). Four color-by-meaning quadrants (cyan/gold/green/orange), numbers 1-4, a hard-shadow needle. Lives docked in the HUD; spinning yields 1-4 which drives climb(steps).
spinner_widget.svg_markup: <g class="spinner" transform="translate(CX,CY)"><circle cx="6" cy="7" r="56" fill="#1b1b1b"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="56" fill="#FAFAF5" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M0 0 L0 -56 A56 56 0 0 1 56 0 Z" fill="#2bb8d8"/><path d="M0 0 L56 0 A56 56 0 0 1 0 56 Z" fill="#e8e52a"/><path d="M0 0 L0 56 A56 56 0 0 1 -56 0 Z" fill="#5bb545"/><path d="M0 0 L-56 0 A56 56 0 0 1 0 -56 Z" fill="#f5841f"/><circle r="56" fill="none" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M0 -56 V56 M-56 0 H56" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="2.5"/><text x="28" y="-24" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="22">1</text><text x="28" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="22">2</text><text x="-28" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="22">3</text><text x="-28" y="-24" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="800" font-size="22" fill="#FAFAF5">4</text><g class="needle" transform="rotate(0)"><path d="M3 6 L-3 6 L0 -50 Z" fill="#1b1b1b" transform="translate(3,4)"/><path d="M3 6 L-3 6 L0 -50 Z" fill="#b3261a" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="2.5"/></g><circle r="9" fill="#FAFAF5" stroke="#1b1b1b" stroke-width="3"/></g>
spinner_widget.spin_css: .spinner { cursor: pointer; } .spinner:active { transform: translate(3px,3px) scale(0.98); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .spinner .needle { transition: none !important; } } /* under reduced motion the needle snaps to the wedge, result still 1-4 */
spinner_widget.drives_climb: On click: result = await spin(); then climb(catToken, S.boardPos, result); S.boardPos += result; each step burns CAPITAL_PER_STEP from the HUD; the landed node fires its trigger (value/funding/hazard/fork/deck/gate). Turn loop per locked spec #3: (a) DRAW a deck card (card-flip = agency) -> (b) SPIN -> (c) climb & fire landed trigger.

build_notes.one_time_board_build: buildBoardSVG(pathway, state) returns an SVG string in ONE pass and is set into #value-board (replacing the static + the two emoji spans). Steps: (1) emit (grid, halftone, regstamp). (2) emit the cyan field rects + title swipe. (3) emit the 3-stroke track path (ink/cyan/dashed). (4) loop NODES[0..23], for each call tileSVG(node) switching on node.type, placing at translate(node.cx,node.cy); milestone gates read PATHWAYS[pathway].stages for their label+need. (5) emit two avatar groups (cat, dog) at their current node anchors. (6) emit the spinner docked at a fixed HUD slot (or render the spinner as a separate small SVG beside the board). Build the board ONCE per game (pathway is fixed at seed); only the avatars + current-highlight update each turn.
build_notes.per_turn_update: renderBoardTurn() does NOT rebuild the SVG. It: (a) moves the cat token via climb() (transform only), (b) moves the dog token to its competitor-progress node, (c) re-stamps the CURRENT gate's readiness lock fill (data/need) if the player is sitting at a gate, (d) toggles a .current class / yellow halo on the landed tile (a <rect> overlay or class swap), (e) on a gate, enables/disables the advance the same way renderActions() already gates on S.readiness >= st.need.
build_notes.wiring_to_existing_engine: Replace renderValueBoard() (the value-% emoji hack) with renderBoard2() that drives the new SVG. Map S.boardPos (new: the snake index, 0..23) alongside the existing S.pos (stage index 0..4). Landing triggers reuse the existing pipeline: VALUE squares can drawEvent(); FUNDING applies +capital via applyDelta; FORK squares call showChoice(RAW_DECK card); HAZARD runs the bankrupt/capital path; GATE squares check S.readiness vs need and (final gate) call openReview(). Capital-per-step = a new CAPITAL_PER_STEP const (~ -$6M/step, tune so an 18-turn runway with ~2.5 avg spin survives a clean line). FAIL LOUD: if NODES[i] is undefined or a trigger id misses RAW_DECK, throw a RuntimeError — do not silently no-op a square.
build_notes.mobile: viewBox 960x560 scales to width:100% inside .value-board (border 3px ink, 6px offset shadow already in css). On <680px the existing @media keeps the SVG full-width; add a 'you are here' auto-scroll that centers the cat's current node when the board is wider than the viewport (scrollIntoView on a hidden anchor at the cat node). Tiles stay legible because the SVG scales as a unit (vector), not reflowing.
build_notes.reduced_motion: Honor the existing @media (prefers-reduced-motion): climb() does single straight tweens (no hop), the spinner needle snaps (no spin), halftone/road are static. All already-guarded patterns in game.css extend to the new .token/.spinner/.hop selectors.
build_notes.phasing: Phase 1 (ship now): flat cyan field + computed tiles + track + tokens + spinner (everything in board-sample.svg is buildable today). Phase 2 (later, optional): Angle C's painted parallax landmarks (capitol dome, bank, tents) as a non-interactive backdrop layer behind the tiles — pure art polish, zero mechanic change.
